---
title: "QMD 笔记示例"
author: "514-koishi-514"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# QMD 笔记示例

这个文件保留了 Quarto 常见的 YAML front matter。网页预览器会把它隐藏掉，然后按 Markdown 内容渲染。

## Python cell

```{python}
import math

values = [math.sin(x / 10) for x in range(5)]
values
```

## Math

$$
\nabla_\theta J(\theta) =
\mathbb{E}_{\tau \sim \pi_\theta}
\left[\nabla_\theta \log \pi_\theta(\tau) R(\tau)\right]
$$

## Table

| Format | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Markdown | Ready | `.md`, `.markdown` |
| Quarto | Ready | `.qmd` preview |
| Text | Ready | `.txt` quick view |
